name: Ferric Citrate
description: Ferric citrate is a phosphate binder indicated for the control of serum phosphorus levels in patients with chronic kidney disease on dialysis.
indication: For the control of serum phosphorus levels in patients with chronic kidney disease on dialysis.

interactions.name: Dimercaprol
interactions.description: Dimercaprol may increase the nephrotoxic activities of Ferric Citrate.

interactions.name: Cefdinir
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cefdinir can be decreased when it is combined with Ferric Citrate.
